overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a foggy, orange-hazed Night City street at night. The player moves from a narrow billboard-lined corridor, through a plaza with NPCs, up stairs, and along an elevated street with futuristic vehicles and neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow advertising corridor with illuminated billboards

events.description: exiting the enclosed billboard corridor into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow corridor with large illuminated billboards on the right wall

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for Giovanni Brandy on the right wall
illuminated advertising stand for Abyss energy drink
tall plain concrete wall running along the left side

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor flanked by a concrete wall on the left and large illuminated billboards on the right. The orange fog creates a hazy atmosphere as the camera approaches the open plaza area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and pedestrian gathering area

events.description: moving from enclosed corridor to open plaza with palm trees and NPCs
beginning ascent of concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past groups of standing NPCs and ascending the stairs to the upper level

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing near the plaza wall
NPC descending the stairs as ego ascends

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading to upper street level
tall palm trees visible through the orange haze
futuristic building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza with palm trees visible through the orange fog. Groups of NPCs stand conversing near the walls as the camera approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city street with parked vehicles and neon building lights

events.description: emerging onto the upper street level with vehicle traffic and neon lights
walking past row of parked futuristic cars along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated city sidewalk past parked vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car parked along the street curb
pedestrian walking in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: row of futuristic vehicles parked along the street with glowing elements
bright orange and blue neon strips on building facades
illuminated digital panels embedded in the sidewalk displaying ads
tall curved street lamps with bright white LED lights

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the camera emerges onto an elevated city street lined with parked futuristic cars and illuminated by vibrant neon building lights. Digital advertisements glow from the sidewalk as pedestrians walk through the foggy orange atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic urban corridor into an expansive, neon-lit elevated cityscape. It begins by navigating a narrow passage flanked by a concrete wall and glowing billboards, moving through a thick orange haze toward a distant opening. As the camera enters a wide plaza, the space expands to reveal palm trees and groups of conversing NPCs before the perspective begins ascending a broad concrete staircase. The scene then shifts to an upper level, emerging onto an elevated street where the orange fog mingles with vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings. Finally, the camera glides past parked futuristic cars and glowing digital advertisements as pedestrians move through the atmospheric city air.
